Application Scenarios

Covering core industrial vision inspection needs

Defect Detection

Automatically identify scratches, stains, cracks and other defects on product surfaces

Deep learning algorithms, adaptive to various defects
No programming needed, sample training ready to use
Recommended Products
UT-SmartGoUT-A100

Positioning Recognition

Precisely locate part positions to guide robotic assembly

Positioning accuracy ±0.05mm
Support rotation, scaling, occlusion
Recommended Products
UT-Smart-2000MUT-SmartGo

Dimension Measurement

High-precision measurement of product dimensions, spacing, and angles

Sub-pixel measurement accuracy
Automatic calibration compensation
Recommended Products
UT-3500AFUT-600II_A

Customer Cases

Real application results

Consumer Electronics

Mobile Phone Component Supplier

Challenge
Metal casing appearance defect detection, many defect types, traditional algorithms difficult to cover
Solution
Deploy 10 UT-SmartGo cameras with deep learning defect detection
Results
  • Detection accuracy 99.7%
  • Detection speed 120 pieces/minute
  • Saved 12 quality inspection personnel
Automotive Manufacturing

Automotive Parts Factory

Challenge
Engine part assembly positioning, high precision requirements, fast production line cycle
Solution
Robot Vision Camera + Robotic Guidance System
Results
  • Positioning accuracy ±0.03mm
  • Assembly cycle improved to 8 seconds/piece
  • Zero assembly errors
Precision Manufacturing

Precision Hardware Enterprise

Challenge
Small part dimension measurement, manual measurement low efficiency and large errors
Solution
UT-3500AF Auto Focus + Measurement Software
Results
  • Measurement accuracy ±0.01mm
  • Measurement efficiency improved 10x
  • CPK value > 1.67

Need customized AI vision solutions?

Our technical team can provide free solution design and algorithm training based on your inspection needs
